## Description

Brief description of the changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`go test ./...`)
- [ ] Code is formatted (`go fmt`)
- [ ] No vet warnings (`go vet ./...`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, USAGE, or code comments)
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and descriptive

## Related Issues

Fixes #(issue number)
